device_name: Saranas Early Bird Bleed Monitoring System

intended_use_full: The Early Bird is intended: • to be inserted into the femoral artery or femoral vein to provide a conduit for the insertion of diagnostic and interventional endovascular devices. • to provide physicians with an early indication of extravascular fluid accumulation, which may be due to a potential internal bleeding complication. • to detect and monitor changes in bioimpedance due to extravascular fluid accumulation, and to provide physicians with indications that a potential internal bleeding complication is progressing. The Early Bird is intended to provide physicians and other healthcare providers with additional information to aid in their clinical assessment of the patient during and after endovascular procedures. As such, it is not intended to diagnose or replace clinical judgment of healthcare professionals.
target_condition: Internal bleeding complications (IBCs) during diagnostic and interventional endovascular procedures
